source: REST facade runtime backlog and rest-facade-runtime-policy shared common prototype distilled into a shared-ownership readiness manifest
description: Pins the public REST facade behavior families that must remain covered before service discovery and service-description request planning delegates to shared runtime code.

expected.commonDecision: REST facade runtime shared ownership remains valid while rest-facade-runtime-policy.json and this readiness manifest are executable from shared commonTest, Android and iOS facade tests continue to reference the same vectors, model JSON mapping vectors remain linked, empty-response and malformed-response parse/decode failures plus response-error transport policies stay covered, public facade error mapping is pinned for service-list and service-description response errors, and the shared tests are compile-verified.

commonRuntimePrototype.status: executable shared commonTest runtime planning guard
commonRuntimePrototype.reason: Declared because this vector is consumed by runtime or fake-transport policy tests before production shared ownership.

notes: This readiness manifest is a shared ownership gate for REST facade behavior-family completeness only; service JSON model mapping, empty-response transport behavior, facade empty-success and malformed-success parse/decode failures, response-error transport behavior, public facade response-error mapping, platform adapter references, and compile verification remain required before production REST facade runtime code moves to shared.
